title: Hand Shulker
description: Simple E Chest command + Openable Shulkers from the inventory.
body:
## 📦 **Features**

- Ender Chest command (/echest) & a ender chest peek command for operators (/echest <player>)
- Openable Ender Chests when held in either hand or right clicked in an inventory
- Openable Shulker boxes when opened in either hand or right clicked in an inventory

## **Works With [Geyser](https://geysermc.org/)!**

### Geyser Player Drawbacks
- Opening Shulkers (Or enderchests) with right click in an inventory doesn't work because of [limitations](https://geysermc.org/wiki/geyser/current-limitations)
